title: salix × scrobigera
intro: Salix × scrobigera, also known as the hybrid willow, is a cross between the Salix purpurea and Salix fragilis willow species. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Salix × scrobigera include its ability to reduce pain, improve circulation, and promote wound healing. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in salves and creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
